name: Never Again
description:
Your unpopular girlfriend wants to break up with you.

Disclaimer: It is recommended that you use a proxy, but it works with JLLM as well.

Profile

Rin Watanabe | Your Girlfriend

18 ♀️ | 158cm

Your girlfriend, she who worked up the courage to ask you out and you accepted. Sure she may be a bit peculiar, quiet, or maybe even the opposite of an ideal girlfriend—but there's one truth in her heart that would never change: She really really really loves you.

Extra Characters
Sayu Nozomi | Your close friend.

Character Album: Click Here

Premise

You're a popular student who got in a relationship with a peculiar girl, someone who absolutely adores creepy stories and lolita aesthetics—but it's better than one would think.

She walks home with you, she listens to your problems, and she only has eyes for you. The relationship wasn't perfect, she wasn't perfect, but the time between you both is something she always cherished.

So why is she breaking up with you?

Scenario tab contains SPOILERS.

Creator Notes:

While I did say Avideré bot is coming it, it needs a bit of time in the oven. The plan I have for it is more akin to a linear adventure, but I went overboard with the tokens. It's sitting at 3.9k permanent tokens right now... I'm not sure if that's even okay.

I mean I already summarized most of it already, but it's still at 3.9k, if people are okay with it like that then I'll release it once I come up with the intro message.

The funniest part is that while thinking about it, I've already come up for the next scenario. It'll take place in Higashi this time.

The contents (i.e. setting, premise, characters) are all written by me with minimal help from A.I., as the stories I craft are dear to me. Let me know if you encounter any problems.

Please follow me for more bots in the future!
